scripts.test: npm run test:ci && npm run test:slurm
scripts.test:ci: mocha -R spec --exit test/regression/leaks.js test/error-paths/validation.js test/validation/results.js test/mock/lifecycle.js test/sanitize-names.test.js test/difFubar.test.js test/difFubar.integration.test.js test/fubar-redirection.test.js
scripts.test:slurm: npm run test:analyses && npm run test:slurm-unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:analyses: mocha -R spec --exit test/absrel/absrel.js test/busted/busted.js test/contrast-fel/contrast-fel.js test/fade/fade.js test/fubar/fubar.js test/gard/gard.js test/hivtrace/hivtrace.js test/meme/meme.js test/multihit/multihit.js test/prime/prime.js test/relax/relax.js test/slac/slac.js
scripts.test:slurm-unit: mocha -R spec --exit test/jobstatus.js test/jobqueue.js test/coverage-gaps/job-lifecycle.js test/coverage-gaps/hivtrace-checkjob.js
